findings.title: Non-atomic balance update in deposit
findings.description: Read-await-write on this.balance allows concurrent async deposits to overwrite each other

findings.title: TOCTOU in withdraw balance check
findings.description: Balance check and subtraction separated by await are not atomic, allowing concurrent overdrawing

findings.title: Non-atomic cross-account transfer
findings.description: Transfer modifies two account balances across an await boundary without serialization

findings.title: TOCTOU in ticket reservation
findings.description: Availability check and decrement separated by await allow overselling of tickets

findings.title: TOCTOU in inventory order processing
findings.description: Stock check and decrement through object property are not atomic across await boundary

findings.title: Non-thread-safe async singleton
findings.description: getConfig uses check-then-create across an await, allowing multiple singleton instances

findings.title: File-based TOCTOU counter
findings.description: File read-increment-write without file locking allows concurrent tasks to lose counter increments
